name: Progress Corticon Decision Service API
description: Progress Corticon exposes business rules as RESTful decision services. The API allows execution of decision services, management of rule assets, and monitoring of decision service deployments. Corticon Server provides a REST endpoint for invoking decision services deployed as web services.
